message:
Switch ftui/ftui-extras/ftui-harness deps from git pins to local paths

Replaces pinned GitHub git revision references for ftui, ftui-extras,
and ftui-harness with local path dependencies pointing to the sibling
../frankentui workspace. This enables faster iteration during local
development and avoids stale git rev pins when the FrankenTUI codebase
is actively evolving alongside this project.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
